# Theia Design
This directory contains game design documents and resources which are developed in the [Theia-design](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia-design.git) repository, separate from the main game repository. 

**Do not edit these files directly in the [Theia](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia.git) game repository, they will be overwritten from the [Theia-design](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia-design.git) repo as a subtree.**

## Subtree
Always pull the latest changes from the [Theia-design](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia-design.git) before referencing in development.
```bash
git subtree pull --prefix=design https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia-design.git main --squash
```
